titleStmt.title: SII 37.43: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 43. (A.R. No. 372 of 1938-39.) Dēvuni-Cuddapah, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: South wall of the Veṅkaṭēśa-perumaḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1460, (current), Hēmaḷaṁbi, Jyēshṭha śu. 15 corresponding to 1537 A.D., May 24, Thursday. There was a lunar eclipse on that day which is not mentioned in the inscription.

It records a grant of land of 1 kha and 5 tūmus (yēṁdumu) in extent to a certain Vasaṁtu, son of Māchirāju by Kaḍapa-Kāluva Tāti-reḍi, Gōli Nāgi-reḍi, Mallela Maṁchireḍi, Tippi-reḍi Māṁchi-reḍi as sarvamānya. The gift land is stated to have been situated in Kaḍapa.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 129.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1460 Agunēṁṭi hēmaḷaṁbi saṁvatsara jēṣṭaśu 15 lu . śrī matukaḍapakā
luva tātireḍi gōli nāgireḍi mallela māṁcireḍi tippireḍi māṁcireḍigāru ja 4 na kāṁpulunupili māṁcirāju
koḍuku vasaṁtuku yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ mā kaḍapagrāmāna nīku sarvvamānyaṁgānu peṭinacēnu pulikuṁṭavāṁgutū
rupukhaṁḍika . cēnu 72 . nu maḍimōṁṭa juvvistaḷaṁ maḍi 72 . nu vubhayaṁcēnu maḍi 3 . yēṁdumunu nīku sarvamāneṁgānu yistimi .
yīcēnu maḍi mīputrapautra pāraṁparyaṁ Anubhavicuvāṁḍavu yidharmmānaku yavaru tappinānu gaṁgakartagōṁbrāhmanini vadhi
ṁccina pāpānabōvuvāru tama tallidaṁḍrini vāraṇāśi
lō caṁppina pāpānabōvuvāru yiṁduku yavvaru dappinānu kaḍapa tiru
veṁgaḷanātanikartana pāpānapōvuvāru .
Digital edition of SII 37.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
